description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the busybox:latest Docker image and defines a global before_script that echoes three setup messages and a global after_script that echoes two cleanup messages. Define three stages (build, test, deploy) and add a build1 job in the build stage that runs the single command `echo "Do your build here"`. Add two parallel test jobs, test1 and test2, both in the test stage; test1 runs `echo "Do a test here"` and `echo "For example run a test suite"`, while test2 runs `echo "Do another parallel test here"` and `echo "For example run a lint test"`. Finally, add a pages job in the deploy stage that runs `echo "Start Deploy GitLab Page"`, creates a temporary `.public` directory, copies all files into it, renames it to `public`, and publishes the `public` directory as a pages artifact, but only when the pipeline runs on the `master` branch.
